race.description: Ladbrokes 55 Second Challenge Series 2 Ht2 Hcp
race.comment: GENTLE STEEL (8) resumed over 1000m at Caulfield Heath and got the job done, beating a speedy horse in Celerity in the process. She's built a good little record in her short career and looks set to go on with it now from a good draw. MRS IGLESIA (10) resumed in the same race and just got too far back, hitting the line well late. If she can land closer from the low gate she'll be very hard to hold out late. CANNYWORTH (4) resumes. He's a speedy 3yo gelding who was last seen running second in an open 3yo race behind Aleppo Pine which is solid form for this. EGERTON (5) just found one better last time here when running on strongly without much luck. She'll be hard to hold out. BLACKBERRY BOMB (7) is going okay and maps for a good run.
